memory.recent_lessons_md:
### 2026-05-29 — Market Open Catch-Up (Pre-Market Silent Failure)

Pre-Market routine did not fire today (no heartbeat). Market-Open is first session of May 29. Three limit bracket GTC orders attempted and blocked (AMD 8.0, MU 8.17, MRVL 7.5). PLTR deferred by 3-entry cap to Mid-Morning.

**MRVL gap-fill lesson (May 28):** MRVL AH hit $228 after Q1 beat. Opened May 28 at $198 (below pre-earnings close $207 = gap-fill, 'sell the news'). Full AH gain given back at open. Re-scored Technical 5/10. This is similar to NVDA Q1 pattern. Lesson: for stocks with 'priced for perfection' narratives, even strong beats can produce gap-fills. The 8sh × $218 MOO estimate in yesterday's plan was too optimistic on the fill price — actual fill would have been $198 (vs $228 AH peak). Stop at fill×0.95=$188 would still be protective.

**AMD Rocket One catalyst (May 29):** New AI cloud provider Rocket One announced AMD infrastructure deal. This is a customer diversification catalyst — AMD gaining AI cloud revenue beyond just Meta/Microsoft/Google. Score upgraded from 7.83 to 8.0.

**API block day 22:** Same root cause (Anthropic sandbox TLS proxy not allowing egress to paper-api.alpaca.markets). Operator manual execution is the only path to trade execution. All routine decisions are correct but execution requires operator intervention.

market.macro_notes_md:
- **US-Iran ceasefire (dominant):** Reports of 60-day MOU 'mostly agreed.' Pending Trump approval. Oil -1.2% (Brent $92.56). Equities supported. Risk-ON.
- **PCE (released May 28):** Core +0.2% m/m (below +0.3% estimate). Headline +3.8% y/y. Less inflationary than feared. Fed on hold. Kevin Warsh hawkish but market absorbing PCE beat.
- **No major data today (May 29).** Light calendar. Market driven by Iran ceasefire headlines.
- **AMD Rocket One partnership (May 29):** New AI cloud provider using AMD infrastructure. Customer diversification catalyst. AMD at ATH $518.
- **MRVL earnings reaction (May 28):** Beat Q1 ($2.418B rev, EPS $0.80), gap-fill at open ($198 vs $228 AH). Closed $206. Today $201. 'Sell the news' pattern.
- **AI capex intact:** MRVL results confirm AWS/Google/MSFT ramping custom silicon. HBM demand (MU), CPU demand (AMD), custom ASIC demand (MRVL) all validated.
- **VIX 15.83:** Risk-ON, normal/moderate band. No fear-driven selling.
- **API blockage (22nd consecutive day):** Only fix: (a) add paper-api.alpaca.markets to egress allowlist OR (b) operator manual execution at https://app.alpaca.markets.
